title: DNA-Extraction-ClostridiaProject
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"eg101","text":"Protocol used for DNA-Extraction of Clostridia in my project. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3eq5l","text":"DNA-Kit used is GenFind V3 by Beckmann/Coulter.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"3ouk","text":"\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"2aej7","text":"Some steps used from:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"7gpoa","text":"Sim JH, Anikst V, Lohith A, Pourmand N, Banaei N. Optimized Protocol for  Simple Extraction of High-Quality Genomic DNA from Clostridium  difficile for Whole-Genome Sequencing. J Clin Microbiol. 2015;53(7):2329-2331. doi:10.1128/JCM.00956-15","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Inoculate Clostridia in 10ml TSB-Broth, incubating at least 48h in anaerobe atmosphere at 37°C 10 mL, TSB broth 48:00:00, at 37°C anaerobic
Take 2ml of Clostridia TSB-Broth and centrifuge for 15min at 3,000g, after that remove supernatant 2 mL, Clostridia TSB broth 00:15:00, centrifuge at 3000g
Add 500ul Lysis-Buffer(LBB) and 30ul Proteinase K, tipmixing or vortexing to resuspend the pellet 500 µL, LBB 30 µL, Proteinase K
Incubate at 57°C for 1h while continously shaking at ~500/min 01:00:00, at 57°C + shaking 500/min

Add 300ul vortexed Black Beads(BBB) and tipmix(at least 10 times), incubate for 5 min at room temperature, place on a magnetic tube stand until no or few beads are left in suspension ~10-15min, then carefully remove supernatant without disturbing the beads-formation 300 µL, Black Beads 00:05:00, at room temperature 00:15:00, magnetic tube stand
Add 800ul WBB and tipmix(at least 10 times), place on a magnetic tube stand until no or few beads are left in suspension ~5min, remove supernatant 800 µL, WBB 00:05:00, magnetic tube stand

Add 800ul WBC and tipmix (at least 10 times), than add 600ul WBC and tipmix, place on a magnetic tube stand until no or few beads left in suspension ~5min , remove supernatant 1400 µL, WBC 00:05:00, magnetic tube stand

Add 100ul distilled water, tipmix 10 times, incubate for 2min at roomtemp, tipmix 10 times again and go to next step OR place in a 4°C fridge overnight, tipmix 10 times next day 100 µL, distilled water 00:02:00, room temperature Overnight, at 4°C
Place on a magnetic tube stand until no beads are left in suspension
Take the supernatant with your DNA and put it in a fresh tube
creator: Tobias Wandt
